title: Selaginella hayatana
taxonomy: Selaginella hayatana is classified as a species of spore-producing plant in the genus Selaginella and family Selaginellaceae. It belongs to the division Lycopodiophyta, which includes all lycopods. This species is further classified as a part of the class Lycopodiopsida and order Selaginellales. As a part of the Selaginellaceae family, it is closely related to other species of Selaginella. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary history and relationships of Selaginella hayatana.

intro: Selaginella hayatana is a type of plant species within the Selaginellaceae family, commonly known as the spikemoss or resurrection fern due to its ability to survive in a desiccated state and revive when water is reintroduced. Traditionally, Selaginella hayatana has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, pain, and respiratory problems, due to its potential health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Selaginella hayatana include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are thought to contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Selaginella hayatana is commonly prepared as a tea or capsule, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
